steps.title: Set up the product
steps.content: The function gives the product of $x$ and a number that is \$91$ more than $x$. The second number is $(x+91)$, so we write: $$f(x) = x(x+91)$$

steps.title: Expand using the distributive property
steps.content: $$f(x) = x(x+91) = x \cdot x + x \cdot 91 = x^2 + 91x$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
